intent: Add bulk course delete with selection mode (Set<string> state), sequential batch deletion, and undo toast to the Courses page.

R1.detail: Select button enters selection mode; Cancel button exits

R2.detail: Checkbox renders on all three card variants

R3.detail: Escape listener exits selection mode and clears selection

R4.detail: Action bar shows with count, Select/Deselect All, Delete, Cancel

R6.detail: Destructive variant, disabled when 0 selected or isDeleting

R7.detail: Sequential removeImportedCourse calls in for-of loop

R8.detail: Partial failure collects failed courses, continues remaining, shows error toast

R9.detail: Selection exits and list reflects removals after deletion

R10.detail: toastWithUndo with TOAST_DURATION.LONG (8s), onUndo restores via syncableWrite add

R11.detail: Sonner toast auto-dismisses; no permanent storage of undo state

findings.title: Selection checkbox overlaps completion and status badges in card components
findings.suggestedFix: Consider shifting the checkbox to `top-3 right-12` (left of the status dropdown) or adjusting z-index layering so the completion badge peeks through when both are visible. Alternatively, accept the overlap as a non-blocking trade-off since selection mode is mutually exclusive with glancing at completion status.
findings.why_it_matters: When selection mode is active, the checkbox (z-40 at top-3 left-3) sits directly on top of the completion badge (z-30) and progress ring (z-20) at the same coordinates. Users cannot see the completion status of a course while it is selected. The compact card has a similar issue where the checkbox (z-20 at top-1 left-1) overlays the status badge (z-10 at top-1 left-1). This is a low-severity cosmetic issue since completion status is visible via the progress bar at the card bottom, and selection mode is transitory.
evidence: ImportedCourseCard.tsx: checkbox at `absolute top-3 left-3 z-40`, completion badge at `absolute top-3 left-3 z-30`
ImportedCourseCompactCard.tsx: checkbox at `absolute top-1 left-1 z-20`, status badge at `absolute top-1 left-1 z-10`

resolvedFindings.title: Undo callback restores all requested courses from snapshot instead of only successfully deleted ones
resolvedFindings.resolution: FIXED — undo callback now iterates `deleted` array (line 200: `for (const course of deleted)`) instead of `snapshot`. Line 208 restored from `deleted`, line 211 count uses `deleted.length`.

resolvedFindings.title: No test coverage for isDeleting guard preventing double-clicks during active deletion
resolvedFindings.resolution: FIXED — test added at Courses.test.tsx line 437: verifies button shows disabled + 'Deleting...' while deletion is in progress using a deferred promise.

resolvedFindings.title: Partial-failure undo test does not verify snapshot-vs-deleted behavior
resolvedFindings.resolution: FIXED — test added at useCourseImportStore.test.ts line 702: verifies undo restores only successfully deleted courses (course1 restored, course2 still present), with no duplicates.

residual_risks: Undo does not survive page refresh (documented scope boundary)
Child records (videos, PDFs) not restored on undo (documented scope boundary)
Large selections (100+ courses) may cause noticeable sequential delete delay
testing_gaps: No test for pressing Delete key in selection mode (only Escape tested)
No E2E test for compact or list view modes (grid only — acceptable per plan scope)
learnings: No past solutions matched this diff context from docs/solutions/
